```{=typst}
#pagebreak()
#wcg-ws-open(
  day: "Day 5", num: 5, title: "Environment and friction checklist",
  purpose: "To make the calmer choice a little easier and the automatic one a little harder.",
  how: [Check any small changes you are willing to try. You do not need to do all
  of them — one or two is plenty.],
)

#wcg-group("Make the automatic purchase a little harder")
#wcg-check("Log out of stored payment details on one site or app.")
#wcg-check("Remove a saved card from one shopping account.")
#wcg-check("Move a shopping app off my phone's home screen.")
#wcg-check("Turn off sale and \"back in stock\" notifications for one store.")
#wcg-check("Add one item to a list instead of buying, and check it tomorrow.")

#wcg-group("Make the calmer choice a little easier")
#wcg-check("Keep a simple list where I can see it.")
#wcg-check("Put a glass of water or a snack within reach for tired moments.")
#wcg-check("Keep the phone in another room during one part of the day.")
#wcg-check("Decide one \"default\" ahead of time (for example, coffee at home first).")

#wcg-field("One change I want to try", lines: 1)
#wcg-field("Where I will set it up", lines: 1)

```

> **A gentle reminder.**
>
> You are designing your surroundings, not testing your willpower.

```{=typst}
#wcg-ws-footer()
```
